summary:
The patient may experience common side effects such as vivid dreams or anorgasmia while taking escitalopram for depression; however, sialorrhea is less likely due to its rarity when compared to more frequent symptoms associated with this medication class. \boxed{\text{sialorrhea}} To clarify which effect can't typically result from using escitalopram based solely on known data about antidepressants' profiles. Agent2 reasoned that although all options could theoretically appear under rare circumstances, only one stands out significantly because it’s far less frequently observed than others linked directly by research findings involving selective serotonin reuptake inhibitors including escitalopram. Thus focusing specifically on 'sialorrhea'. 

Please let me know if you need any further clarification!
